title: Crispy Garlicky Low-Fat-Friendly Croatian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A romantic Croatian dish featuring crispy garlic with a low-fat twist for a healthy twist on traditional dishes.
instructions: Slice the garlic thinly or leave whole cloves for a rustic touch. Thinly slice the red bell pepper and onion.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering but not smoking.
Add the garlic and cook for about 1-2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Next add the broccoli florets and continue cooking for another 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften slightly.
Finally, add the red bell pepper slices and onion. Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes or until all vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, adjust seasoning if necessary.
